title: PHARMACY - 211info
text: AVIVA HEALTH ROSEBURG PHARMACY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF This is an in-house pharmacy that participates in the 340B Drug Pricing Program and may help with discounted prescription costs. Prescriptions are often ready for pick-up shortly after the provider visit, and most refill requests are available on the same day they are made. 150 Kenneth Ford Drive Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Aviva Health patients who are insured or uninsured Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 492-2078 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 492-2078 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: OHP (UHA), Atrio Medicare, CVS CareMark, and most commercial insurances are accepted AREA SERVED: Douglas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located off NE Stephens Street, across the street from Costco Services: Pharmacies Prescription Drug Discount Cards Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - WOMEN REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HEALTH SERVICES SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINATION CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AVIVA HEALTH ROSEBURG
